c74object.name: sounds~
c74object.description: sounds~ is a polyphonic MIDI-to-audio instrument that dynamically loads sound synthesis modules from the modules/ directory. It renders audio on-the-fly using a Just-In-Time rendering strategy to handle complex synthesis designs while maintaining polyphony and correct release phases.

method.name: list
method.digest: Process MIDI Note-On and Note-Off messages
method.description: A list of two integers is treated as a MIDI note. The first integer is the note number (0-127), and the second is the velocity (0-127). A velocity greater than 0 triggers a note-on event; a velocity of 0 triggers a note-off event.

method.name: preset
method.digest: Switch to a specific sound module
method.description: Sets the active sound module to the one at the specified index. Indices are assigned based on the alphabetical order of the DLL files in the modules/ directory.

method.name: random
method.digest: Switch to a random sound module
method.description: Randomly selects one of the available sound modules as the active preset.
